attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	 WPOSD.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY  
	,WPOSD.BK_PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_NUMBER_INT
	,WPOSD.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM         
	,WPOSD.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT   
	,WPOSD.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT
	,WPOSD.DV_POSD_PAID_AMT              
	,WPOSD.DV_POSD_REMAINING_AMT         
	,WPOSD.POSD_RECEIVED_QTY             
	,WPOSD.POSD_INVOICED_AMT             
	,WPOSD.BK_POSD_PO_DISTRIB_NUM_INT    
	,WPOSD.POSD_BILLED_QTY               
	,WPOSD.POSD_CANCELLED_QTY            
	,WPOSD.POSD_ORDERED_QTY              
	,WPOSD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
	,WPOSD.DELIVER_TO_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
	,WPOSD.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY
	,WPOSD.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY
	,WPOSD.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            
	,WPOSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT     
	,WPOSD.SS_CD                         
	,WPOSD.DD_BK_COMPANY_CD              
	,WPOSD.DD_BK_DEPARTMENT_CD           
	,WPOSD.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
	,WPOSD.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   
	,WPOSD.DD_BK_PROJECT_CD              
	,WPOSD.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD           
	,WPOSD.DD_PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY         
	,WPOSD.EDW_CREATE_USER               
	,WPOSD.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
	,WPOSD.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
	,WPOSD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM 
    ,WPOSD.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
	/* pvenketa :30/06/2014 added as part of SC-LSS Q1FY15 */
	,WPOSD.DESTINATION_INV_ORG_KEY
	,WPOSD.DESTINATION_SUBINV_NAME
	,WPOSD.BK_MANUAL_PO_PR_NUM /*Added as part of PO-PR link Q4JULFY16 */
	,WPOSD.SK_PR_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
	,WPOSD.PO_SRC_TYPE_CD
	/* End of changes */
 ,WPOSD.BK_DEPT_CD
  ,WPOSD.BK_COMPANY_CD
  ,WPOSD.DV_OPEN_PO_POSD_PAID_TRXL_AMT
  ,WPOSD.DV_OPEN_PO_POSD_RMNG_TRXL_AMT
  ,WPOSD.DV_OPEN_PO_POSD_TOTAL_TRXL_AMT
FROM  $$WORKDB.W_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION WPOSD
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION  NPOSD 
			   WHERE WPOSD.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY  =NPOSD.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY )
